features.name: untriage_task tool
features.description: Add MCP tool to move tasks back from active to untriaged status

features.name: Pass option in triage flow
features.description: Allow leaving tasks untriaged during session start triage (no-op pass)

features.name: SessionStart hook surfaces active tasks
features.description: Update SessionStart agent hook to show both untriaged and active tasks

features.name: Visual dashboard
features.description: Web UI to browse, search, and manage thoughts — the 'human door' alongside the MCP 'agent door'

features.name: Conversation context capture
features.description: Automatically capture full conversation context (not just summaries) during agent sessions

features.name: Multi-agent shared memory
features.description: Allow multiple AI agents (Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor) to read/write the same brain simultaneously
features.notes: Already supported via MCP — any client with OAuth or API key can access

features.name: Cross-category search
features.description: Unified search across all thought types with filtering, not siloed by category

features.name: Time-bridging alerts
features.description: Proactive alerts for aging tasks, stale relationships, and items needing attention

features.name: Relationship graph
features.description: Visual graph of connections between people, topics, and thoughts

features.name: Periodic reflection prompts
features.description: Scheduled prompts that encourage regular brain review and reflection

features.name: Source attribution & linking
features.description: Link thoughts back to source conversations, URLs, or documents

features.name: Thought versioning
features.description: Track changes to thoughts over time, see evolution of ideas

features.name: Direct edit from UI
features.description: Edit thought text, change status, and delete directly from the dashboard

features.name: Export & backup
features.description: Export brain data as JSON/markdown for backup or migration

features.name: Privacy & access controls
features.description: Per-thought or per-category visibility controls for multi-user scenarios

features.name: Project scoping for thoughts
features.description: Add optional 'project' field to thoughts. Enable project-filtered views in dashboard, project-scoped triage at session start, and a 'project issues' view. Supports the emerging pattern of second-brain as a cross-project issue tracker.

features.name: Session context capture (/compact)
features.description: A dedicated thought_type or structured capture for session handoffs — what was done, decisions made, open threads. Enables resumable conversations via semantic search on session open. Complements the manual SESSION-CONTEXT.md protocol with brain-native persistence.

features.name: MCP input coercion hardening
features.description: Ensure all MCP tool schemas use z.coerce for type-flexible inputs (numbers, booleans). Defensive pattern against MCP clients that serialize all args as strings.

features.name: Service inventory table + MCP tools
features.description: Structured services table in Postgres for tracking business tools, integrations, and spend across all projects. 4 MCP tools: add_service, list_services, update_service, remove_service. Filterable by project, category, status with cost totaling.
